Topbar Search, Activities, Notifications, Chat, Quick Links, Theme, and User Actions
Future Agent Ground Rules
nodes.rationale: Future agents must verify source APIs, distinguish inferred and demo-only evidence, and map external samples to native Velora selectors.

nodes.label: UI Knowledge Documentation Completion Rationale
nodes.rationale: The documentation pass is classified complete because required UI areas were scanned and missing implementations were recorded as gaps instead of being invented.

nodes.label: UI Capability Display Hints
nodes.rationale: UI capabilities govern presentation only; backend authorization remains final.

nodes.label: Disabled Versus Hidden Actions
nodes.rationale: Disable discoverable actions when an explanation helps resolve the blocker; hide actions only when their existence is sensitive or nondisclosable.

nodes.label: Directive Lifecycle and Host Rules
nodes.rationale: Browser guards, managed listener cleanup, signal-driven options, and safe error logging prevent DOM integrations from leaking state or failing under SSR and hydration.

nodes.label: Anti-Template Rule
nodes.rationale: Static tabs, generic columns, inert actions, explanatory overlays, and generic wizard steps do not demonstrate a functioning domain workspace.

nodes.label: Domain Workspace Acceptance Gate
nodes.rationale: Workspace completion requires meaningful state, domain-specific data and validation, semantic comparisons, and real downstream impact.

nodes.label: Honest-Disabled Terminal Actions
nodes.rationale: Terminal actions stay disabled when data, validation, or permissions are incomplete and expose a reason unless the action itself must remain undiscoverable.

nodes.label: Loading, Error, Empty, Partial, and Validation States
nodes.source_location: # States: Loading, Error, Empty, Partial, Validation

nodes.label: Partial Data and Validation States
nodes.source_location: ## Validation Error States and ## Partial Data States

nodes.label: Domain Table Acceptance Gate
nodes.rationale: A domain table is incomplete until its columns, filters, sorting, actions, states, selection, and permission explanations affect real data and workflows.

nodes.label: Pagination and Selection Gaps
nodes.source_location: ## Pagination and ## Selection And Bulk Actions

nodes.label: UI Dependency Rules
nodes.rationale: Shell, features, shared UI, directives, and utilities retain separate ownership so domain workflows do not leak into reusable infrastructure.
